en.extract:
The grey-hooded sierra finch (Phrygilus gayi) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae.
It is found in Argentina and Chile where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.

The '''grey-hooded sierra finch''' ('''''Phrygilus gayi''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]].

It is found in Argentina and Chile where its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.

Grey-hooded sierra finch (Phrygilus gayi caniceps) female Leona Amarga 2.jpg|taking flight
